title: Doomed Caravan
writer: Johnston McCulley, J. Benton Cheney, Clarence E. Mulford
actors: William Boyd, Russell Hayden, Andy Clyde
plot: Stephen Westcott and Ed Martin scheme to put Jane Travers' wagon line out of business. They want to use it take over all the wagon- train traffic going west. Hoppy, California and Lucky must make sure that doesn't happen.
